dag.description: Incremental PyTorch training with a SlipboxKnowledgeRouting step (DKS compile->index->route) feeding Bedrock forced-tool-use scoring, EDX anti-join, and EDX write-back. Two-source: baseline reads the scored-EDX label cache; delta reads live MDS anti-joined vs that cache.

metadata.name: bedrock_slipbox_routing_pytorch_incremental
metadata.description: Incremental PyTorch training with a SlipboxKnowledgeRouting step (DKS compile->index->route) feeding Bedrock forced-tool-use scoring, EDX anti-join, and EDX write-back.

agent_context.when_to_use: Incremental retraining of a DKS-routed LLM-labeled model (e.g. RnR): you have a prior scored-EDX label cache and need to score only NEW orders. The delta path routes each record against a bundled DKS knowledge corpus (SlipboxKnowledgeRouting: compile->index->route) then classifies with Bedrock forced tool-use, writes the labels back to EDX, and merges with the baseline cache for training.
agent_context.when_not_to_use: First-time training (no scored-EDX baseline exists) — use the baseline dag.json first. If the labeling is a simple prompt with no DKS knowledge corpus / semantic routing, use bedrock_pytorch_incremental_edx (no SlipboxKnowledgeRouting step).
differentiators: Only incremental DAG with a SlipboxKnowledgeRouting step (DKS compile->index->route) upstream of Bedrock
Bedrock runs forced tool-use (constrained decoding) on the routed rule set — schema-aligned labels, 0 parse failures
EDX anti-join skips already-scored orders; EDX write-back grows the label cache
Delta feeds BOTH the EDX write-back and the training merge

prerequisites.check: Scored-EDX label cache exists from a prior run (or a prior backfill)
prerequisites.how: Verify the the scored-label EDX ARN is accessible via Cradle
IAM role has bedrock:InvokeModel for the target model
SlipboxKnowledgeRouting bundles the rule_*/pattern_*/behavior_* corpus in its source_dir (default), or mount it via the optional knowledge_corpus channel (DummyDataLoading S3)
Cradle date range covers a period NOT already in the scored EDX

common_pitfalls: BedrockProcessing_delta MUST set bedrock_use_structured_output=true (forced tool-use) or the delta labels drift from the baseline labels
EdxUploading_scored must write the SAME 16-field reversal_predict.json schema the anti-join reads (positional headerless EDX — count+order must match)
knowledge_corpus is OPTIONAL (bundled default) — do NOT wire it unless overriding the corpus via DummyDataLoading
MDS date range must NOT overlap the scored EDX period — causes an empty anti-join result
Cradle transform_sql final projection must equal output_schema (no SELECT *; window/helper columns projected away)

has_prior_scored_edx?.yes: USE THIS DAG (scores only new orders)
has_prior_scored_edx?.no: Use the baseline dag.json first to seed the EDX cache
